nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.id: loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039
nodes.name: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄
nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括马来山鹧鸪、红腹角雉、Green-billed coucal等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulu boobook
nodes.summary: Sulu boobook（Sulu boobook，学名 Ninox reyi），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。
locations: 國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also occasionally seen on forest edge, clearings and plantations. On Tawi-Tawi, the species is also found in mature mangroves and large trees in the vicinity of villages The IUCN Red List classifies this bird as vulnerable with population estimates of 1,000 to 2,499 mature individuals

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining, conversion into farmlands or palm oil plantations and urbanization
